ns0:entry.ns0:title: VueTorrent/VueTorrent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VueTorrent/VueTorrent
Language: vue
The sleekest looking WEBUI for qBittorrent made with Vuejs!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crmeb/CRMEB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crmeb/CRMEB
Language: vue
🔥CRMEB开源商城免费开源多语言商城系统，Tp6框架商城，系统可商用；包含小程序商城、H5商城、公众号商城、PC商城、App，支持分销、拼团、砍价、秒杀、优惠券、积分、会员等级、小程序直播、页面DIY，前后端分离，方便二开，更有详细使用文档、接口文档、数据字典、二开文档/视频教程，欢迎大家提出宝贵意见和建议

ns0:entry.ns0:title: frappe/lms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/frappe/lms
Language: vue
Easy to Use, 100% Open Source Learning Management System

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hslr-s/sun-panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hslr-s/sun-panel
Language: vue

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ikuaitu/vue-fabric-editor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ikuaitu/vue-fabric-editor
Language: vue
快图设计-基于fabric.js和Vue的开源图片编辑器，可自定义字体、素材、设计模板。fabric.js and Vue based image editor, can customize fonts, materials, design templates.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jihe520/MathModelAgent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jihe520/MathModelAgent
Language: vue
🤖📐专为数学建模设计的 Agent ,自动完成数学建模，生成一份完整的可以直接提交的论文。 An Agent Designed for Mathematical Modeling ,Automatically complete mathmodel and generate a complete paper ready for submission.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laoshuikaixue/VoiceHub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laoshuikaixue/VoiceHub
Language: vue
这是一个使用Nuxt 4全栈框架开发的低成本校园广播站点歌系统。系统提供完整的点歌投票、排期管理、权限控制和打印导出功能，具备现代化的UI设计。管理员可通过直观的拖拽界面进行排期管理，支持多播出时段配置。系统内置完善的权限管理体系、学期管理、黑名单控制等功能，同时针对移动端进行了优化，确保在各种设备上都能提供出色的用户体验

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nuxt-ui-templates/dashboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nuxt-ui-templates/dashboard
Language: vue
Nuxt Dashboard Template made with Nuxt UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: vue

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
Language: vue
Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux. It also provides a web version that can be deployed via Docker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
